/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/binary_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/data_win.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/data_win_print.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/ini.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/input_recording.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/instance.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/json_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/json_writer.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/noop_audio_system.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/noop_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/runner.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/runner_keyboard.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/vm_builtins.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/gx_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/main.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/runner_keyboard.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/wii_audio_system.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/wii_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/wiiscotch.dir/src/wii/wii_utils.c.o -o wiiscotch
